Yin Pu ťôįśļ•
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Pu (ťôįśļ•)was born in Henei. Sent to Cao Cao to pay respects, gaining ranks for Liu Zhang and Liu Mao. Yin Pu was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
